  • Classes in pgl.app.model used by pgl.app
    Class
    Description
    Hospital
    Represents a medical facility on the map.
    Triangle
    Represents a geometric triangle defined by three vertices in a 2D plane.
    VictimIncident
    Represents a medical emergency incident on the map topology.
    VoronoiCell
    Pure domain model representing a Voronoi cell.

    Class
    Description
    Hospital
    Represents a medical facility on the map.
    HospitalStats
    Pure immutable data carrier holding statistical metrics for a specific hospital.
    Point
    Represents a point in a 2D Cartesian plane.
    RoadEdge
    Represents a physical road segment connecting two intersections.
    Triangle
    Represents a geometric triangle defined by three vertices in a 2D plane.
    VictimIncident
    Represents a medical emergency incident on the map topology.
    VoronoiCell
    Pure domain model representing a Voronoi cell.

  • Classes in pgl.app.model used by pgl.app.model
    Class
    Description
    Hospital
    Represents a medical facility on the map.
    HospitalStats
    Pure immutable data carrier holding statistical metrics for a specific hospital.
    MedicalSpecialty
    Represents the various medical specialties available within the dispatch system.
    Point
    Represents a point in a 2D Cartesian plane.
    RoadEdge
    Represents a physical road segment connecting two intersections.
    RoadNetwork
    Encapsulates the road network graph structure representing intersections (vertices) and roads (edges).
    Site
    Represents a physical site on the map, extending the base Point class.
    Triangle
    Represents a geometric triangle defined by three vertices in a 2D plane.
    VictimIncident
    Represents a medical emergency incident on the map topology.
    VoronoiCell
    Pure domain model representing a Voronoi cell.
